title: Telescopic Fishing Landing Net – Foldable & Extendable 1.3M Aluminum Handle, Lightweight & Portable Fish/Bird Catch Net (Silver Pole, Green Mesh)
features: 🔹 Telescopic & Adjustable Design: Designed with a 3-section telescopic frame, this foldable fishing landing net extends and collapses with ease. Adjust the length as needed for different fishing scenarios. The anti-skid plastic handle provides a firm, comfortable grip in any condition.

🔹 Durable & Lightweight Build: Constructed with strong aluminum alloy tubing and a rubber-coated mesh, this net is lightweight yet sturdy enough to handle heavy catches. The water-resistant mesh helps prevent waterlogging and odor buildup after use.

🔹 Compact & Travel-Friendly: With a folded length of just 63cm, this net is highly portable and fits conveniently in a standard backpack. Ideal for travel and outdoor fishing trips where space and weight matter.

🔹 Gentle on Fish & Easy to Handle: The soft, non-abrasive mesh protects fish scales during catch and release. A secure rotating lock and metal buckle system makes folding and unfolding the net quick and simple.

🔹 Ideal Dimensions for All Fishing Types: Extended Length: 1.3m Folded Length: 63cm Net Size: 43 x 43 x 43cm Weight: 0.7 lbs Load Capacity: 10 lbs Perfect for sea fishing, lake fishing, river fishing, and boat fishing.
description: Product Description Adventure-Ready Fishing Net: Lightweight, durable, and easy to handle — your go-to companion for every fishing trip. Built to Last, Catch After Catch: Crafted from premium, rust-resistant materials that perform flawlessly in both fresh and saltwater. Compact Yet Mighty: Folds down in seconds for hassle-free travel and storage — perfect for anglers on the move. Previous page Next page Designed for Smarter Fishing: Enjoy fish-safe mesh, a secure grip, and a telescopic rod engineered for precision and comfort.
